---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped product, safety, or operations improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user, operator, or safety problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Scope

- [ ] Product behavior
- [ ] Security/custody
- [ ] Storage/concurrency
- [ ] Observability/audit
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Non-goals

What should this change avoid doing?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Custody impact

Does this touch signing, key material, wallet refs, or custody mode? If yes, describe the risk.
